internationalizations.description: Kenya Urban Roads Authority (KURA) is a statutory body established under the Kenya Roads Act, 2007, responsible for managing and maintaining national trunk roads in urban areas. As an ICT intern, I was embedded in the ICT department supporting network administration, Linux and Windows system installations, and end-user technical support. I assisted with software consultations and ICT helpdesk operations, gaining hands-on exposure to enterprise IT infrastructure and laying the foundation for my professional career in technology.

Caribou Developers is a software consultancy delivering mobile and web solutions across multiple platforms. I developed mobile applications using React Native, Angular, Vue and Flutter, while building backend services with Laravel, Spring Boot and C#. I managed relational and NoSQL databases, integrated third-party APIs including M-Pesa Daraja, and handled end-to-end delivery of client projects — strengthening my full-stack foundation across diverse technology stacks.

ROAM Tech is a technology company delivering enterprise backend solutions. I designed and developed robust backend services using Go and Laravel, crafting RESTful APIs and integrating payment gateways including Paykit and M-Pesa. I implemented security best practices across the platform, optimised database queries for performance and reliability, and built scalable microservice-oriented architectures. My role also extended to front-end work using Vue to deliver fully integrated full-stack solutions.

Moi Teaching and Referral Hospital (MTRH) is Kenya's second-largest referral hospital. I led the modernisation of the hospital's ERP platform, building LIMS integrations using HL7 and DICOM standards for clinical interoperability. I integrated M-Pesa and financial reporting systems to streamline billing workflows, implemented real-time monitoring using Grafana and Prometheus, and managed CI/CD pipelines and DevOps deployments for high availability. Security hardening and HIPAA-aligned practices were applied across the HMS platform, significantly improving clinical operations and data reliability.

Dunia Tech Startup is an AI-focused company delivering intelligent solutions across enterprise, fintech and healthcare sectors. I designed and deployed AI models using TensorFlow and PyTorch, implementing RAG pipelines with LangChain, LangGraph and vector databases (FAISS, ChromaDB). I built CI/CD pipelines for ML model deployment and monitoring, developed AI agents for task automation, and integrated intelligent systems into financial and healthcare platforms. I also applied bias-removal techniques to ensure fair, production-grade model behaviour at scale.

internationalizations.role: Full-Stack Engineer — Cyber Security & AI Compliance
internationalizations.description: Selstan is a cybersecurity and AI compliance company based in Waterloo, USA. I built AI-powered compliance and privacy automation systems, implementing Zero Trust architecture and secure vault workflows to protect PII and reduce enterprise data risk exposure. I developed full-stack applications integrating AI for real-time data classification and monitoring, ensured GDPR, HIPAA and PIPEDA regulatory compliance, and led DevOps environment setup with CI/CD pipelines. I also built AI pipelines for model training, deployment and monitoring, significantly strengthening the organisation's overall security posture.

Value Chain Factory is an enterprise technology company delivering distributed systems and cloud-native solutions. As Senior Software Engineer, I architected high-concurrency distributed systems using Elixir, Phoenix and LiveView with OTP supervision trees. I led microservices and event-driven architecture decisions, designed real-time backend services for enterprise workloads, and built containerised cloud-native deployment pipelines. I drove observability, monitoring and incident response improvements and translated complex business requirements into scalable, maintainable technical solutions — elevating engineering standards across the team.
